THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADLEY, BRENDA ABRAHAM, MYRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 433 ELLIS STREET #212 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,571.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,571.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-20-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JUDGMENT ONLY APPLIES TO DEFENDANT BRENDA BRADLEY. IF DEFENDANT BRENDA BRADLEY VACATES THE PREMISES BY 9/20/01 THEN DEFENDANT SHALL OWE NO RENTS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS.
